series_metadata.series_description: Eisenhower math and science improvement program funded projects' request for proposals. Proposals are developed through which facility will provide profrssional development to meet teacher and student needs in the math and science areas. Competition is

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain records of non-funded proposals in office for one year after funding decision. Retain records of funded projects for one year after completion of project. Retain in National Archival Service for five years after audited by State Auditor and audit report is released, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
